productDisplayName: Just Natural Men Military Shade Rain Jacket
description: Olive green quilted jacket, hood with drawstrings with a strap and buckle detail at back to hold the hood in place when not in use, mesh fabric inside, long sleeves with cording along it and elasticated cuffs with velcro closure, detachable zippered front, placket covering zipper with velcro closure, two welted zippered pockets on the front, branding at left arm, drawstrings at the hem for a snug Fit
